name: Expense entry create flow
description: Implement the expense create flow including the visibility model. Backend: POST /api/v1/expenses (requires: amount, category_key, source, payer_id, date; optional: note, group_ids, visibility, household_id). Expense visibility defaults to `private` for new entries. If the user switches the expense to `household`, the request must include an explicit `household_id` chosen for that submission; category selection remains independent from the household decision. Categories and sources come from the global static catalogs defined in feat-016, and expense create/edit flows may only use categories whose catalog `kind` is `expense`. Frontend: Add Expense page with form (amount-first), category picker, source picker, payer selector, date picker, note, group multi-select, visibility toggle, and explicit household picker that appears only for household-shared expenses. New expense is optimistically appended to the feed. Covers docs/product-specs/expense-tracking.md, expense-ownership.md, and data-visibility.md. Does NOT include edit/delete, search, or quick-add shortcut.
